features.description: CRITICAL: Fix horizontal scroll on /songs page. In app/songs/page.tsx, track rows use `-mx-3` (line 138) and column header uses `-mx-3` (line 117) which extend 12px past the parent `px-4` padding, causing left-right scroll on mobile. FIX: Add `overflow-x-hidden` to the page wrapper div (the `min-h-screen` div around line 54). DONE: No horizontal scroll on /songs mobile. DO NOT TOUCH: sort logic, track rendering. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

CRITICAL: Fix horizontal scroll on homepage. In components/TrackRow.tsx, rows use `-mx-4` which can overflow on homepage where no overflow-x-hidden guard exists. FIX: In app/page.tsx, add `overflow-x-hidden` to the main motion.div container (the flex-col min-h-screen div). DONE: No horizontal scroll on homepage mobile. DO NOT TOUCH: TrackRow itself. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

CRITICAL: Add tagline to homepage. Every QA persona flagged this — first visitors don't understand what the site is. Below the h1 'Lenny's Greatest Hits' and ABOVE the stats line, add a tagline: `

The insights you quote on X, turned into music you can feel.

`. This is already the OG description — it just needs to be on the actual page. DONE: Tagline visible on homepage. DO NOT TOUCH: stats line, buttons. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add tagline p element after h1

features.description: Add missing analytics events. In app/page.tsx search handler: add `trackEvent('search_query', { query: debouncedQuery, result_count: filteredTracks.length })` inside the debounce effect when debouncedQuery changes and is non-empty. In components/EmailSignup.tsx: add `trackEvent('email_subscribed', { email })` after successful submission. In components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx: add `trackEvent('onboarding_dismissed')` in the dismiss handler. Import trackEvent from '@/lib/analytics' in each file. DONE: Search queries, email signups, and onboarding dismissals are tracked. DO NOT TOUCH: existing event tracking. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix album page mobile layout: hide VoteButtons on mobile in track rows. On 375px screens, VoteButtons (3 buttons at 40px each = ~160px) crush the track title to near-zero width. FIX: In app/album/[slug]/AlbumPageClient.tsx, the VoteButtons container (around line 383) should change from `className='flex items-center shrink-0'` to `className='hidden sm:flex items-center shrink-0'`. Also hide the duration+play count section on mobile: change its container to `className='hidden sm:flex items-center gap-3 ...'`. This matches Spotify's pattern — track rows on mobile only show number, cover, title, and a play indicator. DONE: Album track rows are clean on mobile. DO NOT TOUCH: track page VoteButtons (those should stay). VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add hidden sm:flex to VoteButtons container
Add hidden sm:flex to duration/count container

features.description: Fix VoteButtons width on homepage TrackRow mobile. Same issue — VoteButtons take ~160px, crushing track titles on mobile. FIX: In components/TrackRow.tsx, the VoteButtons container (around line 125) should change from `className='flex items-center shrink-0'` to `className='hidden sm:flex items-center shrink-0'`. Mobile users can vote from the track detail page instead. DONE: TrackRow is clean on mobile. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add hidden sm:flex to VoteButtons container

features.description: Fix track page skip buttons touch targets. In app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, the SkipBack and SkipForward buttons (around lines 338-367) contain 20px icons with no padding — too small for mobile touch. FIX: Add `min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] flex items-center justify-center` to both skip button elements. DONE: Skip buttons meet 44px tap target. DO NOT TOUCH: audio logic. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add min touch target to skip buttons

features.description: Improve share text for better conversion. Current share text is generic ('[Track Title] | Lenny's Greatest Hits'). FIX: In app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, change `shareText` to include context: `const shareText = track.sources?.[0]?.guest ? \`${track.title} — ${track.sources[0].guest}'s insights from @lennysan's podcast, turned into a song\` : \`${track.title} | Lenny's Greatest Hits — podcast insights turned into songs\`;`. Also update the X share in NowPlayingBar.tsx if it has share text. DONE: Share text explains what LGH is. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix hardcoded amber accent color in TrackRow. In components/TrackRow.tsx, VoteButtons uses hardcoded `accentColor='#b45309'` (line 128) and the current-track title uses `color: '#b45309'` (line 99). This means tracks from Electric Dreams (purple) or By the Numbers (blue) all show amber on the homepage. FIX: (1) Add `accentColor?: string` to TrackRowProps. (2) In VoteButtons, use `accentColor={accentColor || '#b45309'}`. (3) For the title, use `style={isCurrentTrack ? { color: accentColor || '#b45309' } : {}}`. (4) In app/page.tsx where TrackRow is used, pass `accentColor={getAlbumForTrack(track.slug)?.accentColor}`. DONE: Track rows show correct album accent color. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add Up Next banner text truncation. In components/NowPlayingBar.tsx around line 82-83, the 'Up next: {track title}' text doesn't truncate. Long titles push the Cancel button off-screen on mobile. FIX: Change the text span to `<span className='text-muted-foreground min-w-0 flex-1 truncate'>` and wrap the flex row parent in `min-w-0`. DONE: Up Next text truncates on narrow screens. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add truncate to Up Next text

features.description: Add GlobalNav touch targets. In components/GlobalNav.tsx, the Home link (mobile = icon only) and other nav items have small touch targets. FIX: Add `min-h-[44px] flex items-center` to all nav link elements. For the Search and ThemeToggle icons, increase padding from `p-2` to `p-3`. DONE: All nav items meet 44px touch target. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add track prev/next truncation on mobile. In app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, the prev/next navigation links at the bottom (around lines 611-636) have no width constraint. Long titles can overflow. FIX: Add `max-w-[45%] truncate` to both the prev and next Link elements. DONE: Prev/next titles truncate cleanly. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Create an /about page. Contest judges want to understand the project. Create app/about/page.tsx — a simple server component. Content: 3-4 paragraphs explaining: (1) What this is — Lenny's podcast/newsletter insights turned into real songs. (2) How songs were made — AI-assisted research from 638 episodes, lyrics written to capture the insight, generated on Suno. (3) Why — contest entry for Lenny's 'build something cool with my data'. (4) Who — 'Built by Eric Tan' with LinkedIn link. Keep it minimal, same dark theme. Add a link to /about in the homepage footer. DONE: /about page exists and is linked from footer. DO NOT TOUCH: other pages. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
